customer_insights_segments.description: Customer Insights segmentation based on money attitudes, usage behaviors, and socioeconomic data. This is an attitudinal segmentation that provides deep understanding of customer motivations and financial behaviors.

values.Access: Lowest income segment, constantly worried about finances. Looking for basic financial access.
values.Simplicity: Looking to simplify money management, avoid complexity and fees.
values.Growth: Seeking financial freedom and willing to take risks for reward.
values.Security: Prioritizing safety and protection of their money.
values.Certainty: Seeking predictability and stability in their financial lives.
values.Wealth: Highest income segment. Financially sophisticated with more income, investments, and financial products used.

uses: Product feature prioritization based on segment needs

age_generation_segments.description: Age and generational segmentation based on birth year obtained from Identity Verification (IDV). Critical for understanding life stage needs and product fit.

values.Teen: Under 18 years old. Special account type with restrictions.
values.Not IDVed: Customers who haven't completed identity verification. Age unknown.

geographic_segments.description: Geographic segmentation based on customer location from IDV and geolocation signals.

income_segments.description: Income segmentation based on zip code household income data.

values.30k-70k: Core income segment. Primary target for banking products.
values.70k+: Higher income segment. Target for wealth-building products.

network_segments.description: Geography-based segmentation that captures virality and network effects of specific areas.

values.Self-sustain: Strongest networks with highest virality. Best retention and engagement.
values.Invest: Growing networks requiring investment. Moderate network health.

product_usage_segments.description: Segmentation based on product adoption and usage patterns.

values.P2P Only: Customers only use the app for peer-to-peer payments.
values.Banking Users: Using debit card, direct deposit, or other banking features.
values.Multi-Product Users: Using 2+ product lines. Higher engagement and retention.
values.Primary Banking Actives: Customers using the app as their primary bank. Highest value segment.
